revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ishise-hiko Shrine
| native_name = 石瀬比古神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ishise-hiko Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|37.400776|137.095129}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ishise-hiko Shrine'''|石瀬比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province|ja|能登国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11612019|1=List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province}}
** Series ordinal: 33
** P155: {{ill|Q135040328|ltq=Q135040328|qid=Q135040328|1=Fukeshihikono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Kamusukinoitsumuhimeno Shrine|lt=Kamusukinoitsumuhimeno Shrine|qid=Q135040330|1=Kamusukinoitsumuhimeno Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q1047671|ltq=Q1047671|qid=Q1047671|1=Noto Province}}
* {{ill|Fugeshi District, Ishikawa|lt=Fugeshi district|en|Fugeshi District, Ishikawa|ja|鳳至郡|ko|후게시군|zh|鳳至郡|qid=Q5507254|1=Fugeshi District, Ishikawa}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|37.400776|137.095129}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182375
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Ihasehikono Shrine|lt=Ihasehikono Shrine|qid=Q135040329|1=Ihasehikono Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
